@Frogggggggggggggggggggggggg ❤️ 9
Imagine you go to the new supermarket in your area, and you see three yelling clones who are constantly between nearly bankrupt and the most chaotic management of a store, but it somehow stays afloat and you just have to shop at this weird store because it's closest and most convenient.
@aoibhie1208 ❤️ 9
The milk on the shelf is uht (Ultra Heat Treated) milk. It's pretty common in europe. It's the same as the milk you get in little sealed plastic pots in hotel rooms etc for your coffee. It tends to taste sweeter. It was weird to me as well, but when it's opened it has to be kept in the fridge
@bpmadmasta98 ❤️ 7
Bob’s comment of “I have to do math” gave me “Wait, I have to do math? This is school!” energy from the Oregon Trail Distractible episode.
@TundraDude37 ❤️ 7

@deonteburtraw3701 ❤️ 6

@number1Gameking ❤️ 362
Edit: a lot of you have pointed out stuff that I got wrong so I'm going to correct the misinformation I spread by mistake. I was repeating information that I had previously learned, but I've looked into it again after a lot of you doubted me and I realized I was incorrect. We don't actually know how he smuggled out the information, the movie is just depicting what the CIAs top theory was, Snowden is never confirmed how he did it.

For those saying he didn't uncover anything, he did. People knew the Patriot act was a thing, but they didn't know how far it went until he reached the information. The government had sold it has a system they were using to catch spies, when in reality it was a widespread Network used to spy on its own citizens and gather personal data on people. Now sadly we've basically rebuilt the Patriot act and just privatized it to corporations so that's fun.




My incorrect original post: For those who don't know what this is from or what it is, this is genuinely how Edward Snowden leaked that the us government was spying on its citizens, in preparation for the event he began bringing that Rubik's cube back and forth with him to work every single day and actually made a habit of tossing into the guards so they got used to it.

@User8Re5kTf7fk ❤️ 10.4k
Jokes aside, this was one of the most creative interpretations of how magic can be done with sounds and specific hand gestures that require hard work of memorizing specific patterns. I'll take this creative reinterpretation over slamming staffs and yelling any day.
@MrSailing101 ❤️ 8.2k
“I’ll be most impressed if you succeed.”

Wisdom enough to not jump to saying the kid can’t pull it offf.
@mrfortune-777 ❤️ 7.9k
I loved the emphasis on somatic spellcasting. It’s so rare to see that kind of magic depicted in a visual medium like movies.
@chibigirl8545 ❤️ 6.9k
"I'll be most impressed if you succeed" is probably one of the best things you can tell a kid. You're still putting into scope the difficulty without discouraging them and you're also keeping yourself humble. This line needs more attention.

@Guntherino13 ❤️ 7.8k

@AdamRhodes536 ❤️ 3.3k
In real life, Snowden memorized the information. The rubix cube would have gone through the x-ray and the microSD card wouldn't have even made it in much less out
@MARVEL_KING1114 ❤️ 1.3k
and what if they just put the cube through the xray machine with his bag? lol
@ZEpidemiya ❤️ 829

@number1Gameking ❤️ 362
Edit: a lot of you have pointed out stuff that I got wrong so I'm going to correct the misinformation I spread by mistake. I was repeating information that I had previously learned, but I've looked into it again after a lot of you doubted me and I realized I was incorrect. We don't actually know how he smuggled out the information, the movie is just depicting what the CIAs top theory was, Snowden is never confirmed how he did it.

For those saying he didn't uncover anything, he did. People knew the Patriot act was a thing, but they didn't know how far it went until he reached the information. The government had sold it has a system they were using to catch spies, when in reality it was a widespread Network used to spy on its own citizens and gather personal data on people. Now sadly we've basically rebuilt the Patriot act and just privatized it to corporations so that's fun.




My incorrect original post: For those who don't know what this is from or what it is, this is genuinely how Edward Snowden leaked that the us government was spying on its citizens, in preparation for the event he began bringing that Rubik's cube back and forth with him to work every single day and actually made a habit of tossing into the guards so they got used to it.
@spingthing ❤️ 136
"you gotta do the white cross and do the corner" he just explained 2 step and step out
@SarkenHS ❤️ 100

@LozZac_Tried ❤️ 25

@Jettyper ❤️ 19

@SaintSarcasm ❤️ 12

Damn... the emotions you can hear in his voice when he says that he thought he never see him again. You can tell he missed him sooo much. That's beautiful! ❤️
@healthiswealth7324 ❤️ 9.3k
That’s the brotherhood in serving together in the military when you struggle endure and laughed through it together— words, not necessary!
@chrisbird-g1k ❤️ 8.6k
Love it . Never underestimate the bond of serving in the forces whichever Nation you serve . Brothers for life 👍🏻❤️
@nelsonfan24 ❤️ 7.1k
Damn, I wish the video was longer. I would love to hear this story. I'm glad they found each other.
@ideacrafter ❤️ 2.2k
I retired from the Navy in 1999. A couple of years ago, I drove from Florida to Georgia to the doorstep of an old shipmate whom I had found online. On his birthday, I rang his doorbell, and his daughter called back into the house for him. it was awesome!!!
@stitchesx-x-x ❤️ 2.1k
The bonds soldiers form with each other while in service must be so close. I'm glad they found one another again. ❤
@Itz_isa_eddie ❤️ 1.5k
I thought he was looking for ticks like the bug😭✌️🫰🏻🥀
@scotthulldriver5036 ❤️ 1.3k
I am not even a combat veteran, but I am a decorated us Army veteran who got to see his fair share. I have at least 5 Brothers out there that I haven't seen in 30+ years...this one made me cry. Thank you.
@lynncorum3119 ❤️ 1.2k
Nice! Once when we were headed out to breakfast after church, a hotel we passed by was advertising a reunion of my dad’s old seabee unit. Of course we stopped there, and he reconnected with numerous men he’d lost touch with for decades. It happens. Glad these two got together.
@terriemilburn1657 ❤️ 1.1k
Thank both of you men for serving and Thank God...coming home!!!
@lululovesyou7618 ❤️ 899
They went through some stuff together, for sure. Thank you both for your service.
@keniwilliams1101 ❤️ 874
Two seconds and I was already bawling like a baby ... Respect! Thank you for your service gentlemen!
@coffeefuelsme ❤️ 856
My grandpa used to go by “popcorn”… if anyone’s ever showed up at our door asking for “popcorn”, you know they’re an O.G.

These nicknames typically come out of the military for one reason or another
@AlexiAcosta-o6w ❤️ 653
Wow! Incredible! Men of honor,band of brothers.!
@brucedubbink6968 ❤️ 562
Thank you for your service. You are heroes.
@TonyRoxanne ❤️ 539
True Vets Always Brothers for Life thank God
@markledford5958 ❤️ 492
This is the bond between men who rely on each other to survive, it’s very powerful
@Debbie-s9t ❤️ 469
Thank you both for your service. God bless you both ❤😊
@leeee-findme13345 ❤️ 399
I got to witness my great grandfather talk war stories with a man he hadn't seen in 50 years it was one of the happiest times id ever seen him
@Crankyfrog36 ❤️ 324
58 damn years wow! Respect for remembering that long jeez
@BrenZZs_GIA ❤️ 291
Brothers in service are brothers for life.
@TheSinDen ❤️ 255
Thats a War bond there.. Thank you for severing our Country
@scraspjscraspj2656 ❤️ 207
True american heroes. Thank you both for your service and sacrifices for our Country and our Freedoms. God Bless you both. We love our veterans.
@shirleydavis3387 ❤️ 198
What a wonderful moment and truly a blessing from above thank you lord .
@cruisepaige ❤️ 173
I love love love this. Veterans deserve so much more than we give them. Guys I'm so glad you had this moment.
@ceemissalways ❤️ 142
I'm looking for the family of Shorty Rogers. My Dad, a Black man, spoke highly of him. Despite severe racism, Shorty Rogers took my Dad under his wing in the Navy (Korea)1949-1952, and helped create the man who would become a great educator of America's children. Very grateful.
@MoonSmiles9999 ❤️ 139
Brothers (Boys!) in Arms! Forever linked. They became men under the direst of circumstances! God bless these souls that gratefully were allowed to return home after protecting their nation and its Citizens!

Seeing men be vulnerable and crying always gets me worked up too, so beautiful
@SamanthaStBernard-f6k1r ❤️ 89
Aww. Brotherhood can never be broken ❤

@Iron_Entitiy_Foundation ❤️ 17
All Crash Bandicoot lore

So the lore is in two branches at first, then goes into one. Let’s begin with branch 1: the Aku-Uka branch.

Thousands of years ago, on N. Sanity Island, there lived two witch doctors: Aku Aku and Uka Uka. One day, they decided to immortalize themselves by placing their spirits into one of their magical wooden masks.

As time went by, Uka Uka grew evil and sinister, even planning to conquer the world. The two brothers had a long war, and eventually, Aku Aku won and managed to seal his brother in Jaws of Darkness. He then lay in hibernation for a good amount of time, and now we get to the second branch: the Cortex branch.

Neo Cortex was born to a family of circus clowns but preferred scientific studies over entertaining others. Due to this, he was mocked by the members of the circus, and at the age of three, a group of performers tattooed an N on his forehead for nerd. One day, Cortex just couldn’t take it anymore and he decided to use his knowledge to enslave the planet’s inhabitants. He caused a freak explosion that killed his whole family, then worked for years on his plan. He hires Dr. Nitrus Brio as his assistant, and together, they make the Evolvo-Ray, a device that can zap animals up the evolutionary chain; as well as the Cortex Vortex, which would brainwash them into doing Cortex’s bidding.

Eventually, the two would set up a base on Cortex Island, which is in the same archipelago as N. Sanity Island. And this is when the two branches come together.

Uka Uka makes contact with Cortex, knowing they have a common goal, and they form an alliance. Anyway, Cortex and Brio create an army of genetically enhanced and brainwashed animals, and the one to lead them all was Crash Bandicoot. but, for some strange reason, the Cortex Vortex doesn’t work on Crash, and the bandicoot escapes. Cortex’s next subject? Tawna, whom Crash just so happened to take a liking to.

Crash washes ashore on N. Sanity Beach, recollects the recent events, and is very upset about being distanced from his loved one, and awakens Aku Aku from his hibernation. Now Crash has to make it back to Cortex Castle to save his girlfriend, with Aku Aku helping Crash by scattering his magical wooden masks across the island to help him. Crash defeats Papu Papu, the chief of N. Sanity Tribe; Ripper Roo, Koala Kong and Pinstripe Potoroo, three of Cortex’s cronies. Crash sets Castle Cortex on fire while battling N. Brio, Cortex goes plummeting to the ground after Crash defeats him, and the two lovebandicoots reunite. We never see Tawna after this. Papu Papu sells the ruins of Chateau Cortex to a resort developer, and uses the proceeds to open a shopping center on the island, Ripper Roo undergoes higher education, Koala Kong moves to Hollywood, Pinstripe founds a sanitation company in Chicago, N. Brio becomes a bartender, Cortex’s fate is unknown, and peace is restored.

Until Cortex awakens in a cavern filled with crystals, and gets an idea. He hires a new assistant, Dr. N. Gin, gets to work on another mutant bandicoot who just so happens to be Crash’s sister, Coco (she escapes before the Vortex), and builds a new space station. He apparently needs more crystals for his master plan, so when Coco sends Crash to get an extra battery for her laptop, Cortex kidnaps Crash and sends him to get the crystals, claiming that he needs their power to stop a planetary alignment. Brio tells Crash to get the gems instead to foil Cortex’s plans. Crash goes with the crystal path, and Brio is forced to send his minions (former Cortex Commando Ripper Roo, and newcomers Komodo Bros. and Tiny Tiger). But at the end, Coco finds out that he’s gonna make a huge Cortex Vortex ray to brainwash Earth, Crash defeats Cortex, gets the gems, Brio destroys Cortex’s space station, and peace is restored.

Until the space station frees Uka Uka. Uka is (understandably) mad at Cortex for failing him twice, but decides to spare his life only because he had just been freed. New plan: get the crystals from different time periods using Dr. N. Tropy’s Time Twister.

Aku Aku notices Uka Uka is free and takes Crash and Coco to the time machine thing. They get the crystals, defeat Tiny (now with Cortex), defeat newcomer Dingodile, defeat N. Tropy, defeat N. Gin, defeat Cortex, defeat Uka Uka, the three bad guys are sucked into an asteroid for 22 years (enough time for Cortex and N. Tropy to age again from their recent baby transformation), peace is restored.

Until Uka Uka’s screaming rips a hole in the space-time continuum. N. Tropy and Cortex cross the rift, uncover the source of its power, and use it to open more rifts to enslave not only the planet’s inhabitants, but the multiverse’S inhabitants. Their opening of rifts awakens the Quantum Masks, who are scattered around the multiverse. One of them, Lani-Loli, is in N. Sanity Island, and a great power is emanating from N. Sanity Peak now. Aku Aku sends Crash to investigate, and Crash finds Lani-Loli and a quantum rift. Crash, Aku Aku, Coco and Lani Loli cross the rift, defeat N. Gin, who is now a metalhead; defeat N. Brio that traitor, who ends up turning into a pterosaur; find Akano and Kupuna-Wa, and come across an alternate reality Tawna who is a pirate and therefore way cooler than you. When they defeat Cortex, however, N. Tropy double-crosses Cortex and announces his new plans with a new partner. Seeing that they have a common enemy, Cortex teams up with Crash and co. to take N. Tropy down. They find the last Quantum Mask, Ika-Ika, and make it to N. Tropy’s space station (actually it’s the space station of extraterrestrial racer Nitros Oxide). The new partner is a female N. Tropy who is from Alt Tawna’s universe, Dingodile retired from villainy to open a diner (it was destroyed), he got sucked into quantum rifts and met Alt Tawna, the gang goes to defeat N. Tropy, it is revealed that Female N. Tropy killed Alt Crash and Alt Coco, the N. Tropies are defeated, the gang goes for lunch at the Sn@xx Dimension, Cortex goes back in time to undo Crash, Crash and Coco defeat him, Past Cortex goes on to put Past Crash in the Vortex, Present Crash destroys the Cortex Vortex’s Regulator, the Cortex Vortex doesn’t work on Crash, Present Cortex is sent to the end of the universe, Dingodile reopens his diner, Cortex is enjoying the end of the universe, Crash, Coco, Aku Aku, Alt Tawna and the Quantum Masks now live together, N. Gin abandons heavy metal for smooth jazz, N. Brio is caged in Ripper Roo’s taxidermy display, Nitros Oxide becomes hooked on caffeine, Cortex’s lab assistants repurpose Cortex’s airship into a crystal shop, Dingodile franchises his diner, Alt Tawna takes up scrapbooking, Coco takes up eSports, the N. Tropies’ fates are unknown, all loose ends are tied, nice ending, peace is restored.





Until Uka Uka shows up in the end of the universe
